rows.title: 他沉默時，你最想聽見哪一句話？
rows.kpi_command: python3 tools/promotion_post_writeback.py update --platform youtube_shorts --task-id publish-lt-s01-iris-silence --status published --published-date 2026-06-20 --post-url <REAL_YOUTUBE_SHORTS_URL> --site-clicks 0 --quiz-starts 0 --quiz-completions 0 --proof-note "<REAL_ANALYTICS_SOURCE_PROOF_NOTE> verified"
rows.next_action: Publish the post and replace the placeholder URL with a real public post URL.

rules: Post URL writeback comes before KPI interpretation.
A placeholder URL must never pass public URL verification.
Zero KPI values are valid only with checked-source proof.
Weekly review stays closed until all active first-batch rows pass URL and KPI evidence checks.
